rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Gov't Code §2306.031, which governs board members' compensation and expense reimbursement.
quote: Members of the board serve without compensation but are entitled to reimbursement for actual expenses incurred in attending board meetings and in performing the duties of a board member.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict exists.
